Thompson Builders Corporation And Berkley Insurance Companys Notice Of Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration And Motion To Stay The Action [Code Civ. Proc., 1281, 1281.2, 1281.4]
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dawn Ceizler, Esq. 925-932-8225 for Plaintiff Kwan Wo.
Deborah Wilson, Esq. 510-465-7100 of McInerney & Dillon for Defendant BERKLEY INSURANCE COMPANY and Thompson Builders Corporation.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff argues and cites case. 10:05 The matter is recalled. Plaintiff argues Winters case. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BERKLEY INSURANCE COMPANY and Thompson Builders Corporation's Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration And Motion To Stay The Action [Code Civ. Proc., 1281, 1281.2, 1281.4].

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendants Thompson Builders Corporation and Berkley Insurance Company's motion to compel arbitration and to stay the action is granted. The Thompson/Kwan Wo contract contains an enforceable provision for binding arbitration and is not unconscionable. Except for the provisions of the DRB manual that are specifically referenced in the contract, the DRB manual is not applicable to the resolution of the parties' disputes.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Also, Parties can come in Ex parte to deal with existing Discovery orders.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
